pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Technical Foundations is a primary or secondary domain for the Data Platform Team Lead. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (team lead).

decision_rationale: Technical Foundations knowledge KSA is within scope for the Data Platform Team Lead at the team lead tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
